channel.title: Audio Plugin Guy - Deals Feed
channel.description: Las mejores ofertas de Audio Plugin Guy.

item.title: [HOT] Softube|Get 70% off Softube American Class A at Audio Deluxe. The discounted price is $59.!? NEW

item.title: [FREEBIE] FeelYourSound|FeelYourSound has updated SongEngine, a free MIDI generator plugin, to version 1.5.0, adding new Live Mode for real-time chord transformation.!
